title: Formula / symbolic statement
bodyText: ® Empty relation is the relation R in X given by R = phi subset X x X.
normalizedText: ® empty relation is the relation r in x given by r = phi subset x x x.
subject: mathematics

title: Formula / symbolic statement
bodyText: ® Universal relation is the relation R in X given by R = X x X.
normalizedText: ® universal relation is the relation r in x given by r = x x x.
subject: mathematics

title: Formula / symbolic statement
bodyText: ® Reflexive relation R in X is a relation with ( a, a) in R ∀ a in X.
normalizedText: ® reflexive relation r in x is a relation with ( a, a) in r ∀ a in x.
subject: mathematics

title: Formula / symbolic statement
bodyText: ® Symmetric relation R in X is a relation satisfying (a, b) in R implies (b, a) in R.
normalizedText: ® symmetric relation r in x is a relation satisfying (a, b) in r implies (b, a) in r.
subject: mathematics

title: Formula / symbolic statement
bodyText: ® Transitive relation R in X is a relation satisfying ( a, b) in R and (b, c) in R
normalizedText: ® transitive relation r in x is a relation satisfying ( a, b) in r and (b, c) in r
subject: mathematics
